project.name: desktop-agent
project.description: Desktop Agent - AI桌面工作助手，基于 Electron 的 AI agent 桌面应用

nodes.name: index.html
nodes.summary: Entry HTML file for the Desktop Agent renderer process, mounting a React app into a #root div.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Package configuration for @desktop-agent/renderer, a React 19 app using Vite, Tailwind CSS 4, and Zustand for state management.

nodes.name: tsconfig.json
nodes.summary: TypeScript configuration extending base config, targeting React JSX with path aliases for src/ and references to the shared package.

nodes.name: package.json
nodes.summary: Root monorepo package manifest for desktop-agent. Defines project metadata, build/dev/test/lint scripts orchestrating multiple workspace packages, and shared dev dependencies (TypeScript, ESLint, Vitest, Prettier, concurrently).

nodes.name: pnpm-workspace.yaml
nodes.summary: PNPM workspace definition declaring apps/ and packages/ as workspace directories, with allowBuilds for esbuild and electron.

nodes.name: tsconfig.base.json
nodes.summary: Shared base TypeScript configuration targeting ES2022 with ESNext modules, bundler resolution, strict mode, and standard build artifacts (declarations, source maps).

nodes.name: .npmrc
nodes.summary: NPM 配置文件，设置 Electron 二进制下载镜像为 npmmirror.com

nodes.name: .understandignore
nodes.summary: 代码分析工具的排除配置文件，支持 .gitignore 语法排除文件和目录

nodes.name: understand-anything config
nodes.summary: 代码分析工具配置文件，输出语言设置为中文(zh)

nodes.name: electron.vite.config
nodes.summary: Electron-Vite 构建配置，定义 main 和 preload 两个构建目标，输出为 CJS 格式

nodes.name: electron package.json
nodes.summary: Electron 主进程包配置，依赖 agent-runtime、shared、tools 工作区包，使用 electron-vite 构建

nodes.name: loadEnvFile
nodes.summary: 环境变量文件加载器，解析 .env 文件格式并注入 process.env，支持多路径加载和 export 前缀

nodes.name: parseEnvLine
nodes.summary: 解析单行 .env 文件内容，支持注释、export 前缀、引号包裹的值

nodes.name: loadEnvFile
nodes.summary: 从多个路径加载 .env 文件，将环境变量注入 process.env（不覆盖已存在的值）

nodes.name: loadProjectEnv
nodes.summary: 加载项目级环境变量，依次尝试项目根目录、apps/electron 和 cwd 下的 .env 文件

nodes.name: main
nodes.summary: Electron 主进程入口，创建 BrowserWindow、初始化 AgentRuntime，处理 IPC 通信（会话创建、消息发送、流式响应）

nodes.name: readEnv
nodes.summary: 读取环境变量，支持原始名称和 MAIN_VITE_ 前缀两种格式

nodes.name: createRuntime
nodes.summary: 从环境变量读取 API 配置并创建 AgentRuntime 实例

nodes.name: createWindow
nodes.summary: 创建 Electron 主窗口，开发模式加载 localhost，生产模式加载本地 HTML 文件

nodes.name: getAgentErrorFromMessages
nodes.summary: 从 Agent 响应消息中提取错误信息，处理 API Key 缺失、请求失败等场景

nodes.name: preload
nodes.summary: Electron preload 脚本，通过 contextBridge 暴露安全的 electronAPI 给渲染进程

nodes.name: electron tsconfig
nodes.summary: TypeScript 编译配置，继承基础配置，引用 shared、tools、agent-runtime 包

nodes.name: vitest config
nodes.summary: Vitest 测试框架配置，启用全局 API 和 Node 环境

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: React 应用根组件，使用 RouterProvider 提供路由

nodes.name: App
nodes.summary: 应用根组件，渲染 RouterProvider

nodes.name: ChatInput
nodes.summary: 聊天输入组件，支持自动调整高度、Enter 发送、Shift+Enter 换行，读取 isProcessing 状态

nodes.name: ChatInput
nodes.summary: 聊天输入组件，包含 textarea 和发送按钮

nodes.name: ChatPanel
nodes.summary: 聊天面板容器组件，组合 Header、MessageList、ChatInput，使用 useAgent hook 获取 sendMessage

nodes.name: ChatPanel
nodes.summary: 聊天面板组件，组合头部、消息列表和输入框

nodes.name: MessageItem
nodes.summary: 单条消息渲染组件，区分用户消息（右对齐蓝色气泡）和 AI 消息（左侧文本+工具调用卡片）

nodes.name: MessageItem
nodes.summary: 渲染单条消息，根据 role 切换用户/AI 布局

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: 消息列表组件，自动滚动到底部，空状态显示欢迎提示

nodes.name: MessageList
nodes.summary: 消息列表组件，读取 messages 和 isProcessing 状态

nodes.name: ToolCallCard
nodes.summary: 工具调用卡片组件，展示工具名称和执行状态（等待/执行中/完成/失败），可点击查看详情

nodes.name: ToolCallCard
nodes.summary: 工具调用卡片组件，根据 status 显示不同状态图标和文字

nodes.name: getStatusIcon
nodes.summary: 根据工具调用状态返回对应的 lucide-react 图标

nodes.name: getStatusText

nodes.name: AppLayout
nodes.summary: 应用布局组件，左侧 NavSidebar + 右侧内容区（通过 Outlet 渲染子路由）

nodes.name: AppLayout
nodes.summary: 布局组件，读取 sidebarCollapsed 状态

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: 页面头部组件，显示标题和工具面板切换按钮

nodes.name: Header
nodes.summary: 头部组件，读取 toolPanelVisible 和 toggleToolPanel

nodes.name: NavSidebar
nodes.summary: 导航侧边栏组件，包含导航链接（新对话/搜索/插件/自动化）、会话列表、设置入口和折叠按钮

nodes.name: NavSidebar
nodes.summary: 导航侧边栏组件，读取 sidebarCollapsed、sessions、currentSessionId 等状态

nodes.name: GeneralSettings
nodes.summary: 通用设置页面组件，包含语言选择、主题选择和工作目录配置

nodes.name: GeneralSettings
nodes.summary: 通用设置组件，渲染语言、主题、工作目录表单

nodes.name: McpSettings
nodes.summary: MCP 服务器设置页面组件，支持添加/删除/启停 MCP 服务器（本地 stdio 或远程 SSE）

nodes.name: McpSettings
nodes.summary: MCP 设置组件，管理服务器列表状态（添加/删除/切换）

nodes.name: addServer
nodes.summary: 向 MCP 服务器列表添加新的空服务器配置

nodes.name: removeServer

nodes.name: toggleServer

nodes.name: ModelSettings
nodes.summary: 模型配置设置页面组件，支持添加/删除模型配置（provider + API Key + model 名称）

nodes.summary: 模型设置组件，管理模型配置列表（添加/删除）

nodes.summary: 向模型配置列表添加新的空模型配置

nodes.name: removeModel
nodes.summary: 根据 ID 从模型配置列表中移除模型

nodes.name: DiffView
nodes.summary: Diff 对比视图占位组件，等待 Agent 修改文件后显示文件差异

nodes.name: DiffView
nodes.summary: Diff 视图组件，当前显示空状态占位

nodes.name: FilePreview
nodes.summary: 文件预览组件，根据 selectedFile 显示文件内容预览（当前为模拟数据）

nodes.name: FilePreview
nodes.summary: 文件预览组件，读取 selectedFile 状态显示预览内容

nodes.name: ToolHistory
nodes.summary: 工具调用历史组件，汇总所有消息中的工具调用，按 ID 倒序显示状态和输入摘要

nodes.name: ToolHistory
nodes.summary: 工具历史组件，从 messages 中提取并展示所有工具调用记录

nodes.name: getStatusIcon
nodes.summary: 根据工具调用状态返回对应图标组件

nodes.name: ToolPanel.tsx
nodes.summary: Side panel component with tabs for file preview, tool call history, and diff view. Controlled by UI store for visibility and active tab state.

nodes.name: ToolPanel
nodes.summary: React component rendering a collapsible side panel with three tabs (preview, history, diff) using Tab, Button, ScrollArea, FilePreview, ToolHistory, and DiffView sub-components.

nodes.name: avatar.tsx
nodes.summary: Avatar UI primitive component providing Avatar container and AvatarFallback for displaying user/system avatars with circular styling.

nodes.name: Avatar
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref div component rendering a circular avatar container with overflow hidden.

nodes.name: AvatarFallback
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref div component rendering a centered fallback element inside an avatar (gray background, rounded).

nodes.name: badge.tsx
nodes.summary: Badge UI component with variant support (default, secondary, destructive, outline) using class-variance-authority for styling.

nodes.name: Badge
nodes.summary: Badge component rendering a styled inline-flex div with variant-based color classes via cva.

nodes.name: button.tsx
nodes.summary: Button UI component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes (default, sm, lg, icon) using class-variance-authority.

nodes.name: Button
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref button component applying cva-based variant and size classes with Tailwind CSS styling.

nodes.name: input.tsx
nodes.summary: Input UI component wrapping a native input element with consistent styling (border, focus ring, disabled state).

nodes.name: Input
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref input component with Tailwind CSS classes for border, padding, focus ring, and disabled states.

nodes.name: scroll-area.tsx
nodes.summary: ScrollArea UI component providing a simple overflow-auto div wrapper for scrollable content areas.

nodes.name: ScrollArea
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref div component rendering a relative-positioned overflow-auto container with optional orientation prop.

nodes.name: textarea.tsx
nodes.summary: Textarea UI component wrapping a native textarea with consistent styling (border, padding, focus ring, disabled state).

nodes.name: Textarea
nodes.summary: Forwarded-ref textarea component with Tailwind CSS classes for border, padding, focus ring, min-height, and disabled states.

nodes.name: useAgent.ts
nodes.summary: Custom React hook managing agent session lifecycle and message communication via Electron IPC. Handles session creation, message sending with streaming support, and error handling.

nodes.name: useAgent
nodes.summary: Custom hook returning createSession, sendMessage, closeSession functions. Manages streaming message updates via electronAPI.agent.onStreamMessage, creates placeholder assistant messages, and handles error states.

nodes.name: createId
nodes.summary: Generates a random 13-character alphanumeric ID for messages and sessions.

nodes.name: agentMessage.ts
nodes.summary: Utility module for parsing agent SDK messages. Extracts text from streaming partial messages, assistant messages, and result messages. Handles error detection and hint mapping.

nodes.name: extractStreamText
nodes.summary: Extracts text from a streaming message object. Handles partial_message (text delta) and assistant message types, appending to currentContent.

nodes.name: parseMessageContent
nodes.summary: Parses message content from string or array of text blocks into a single string.

nodes.name: analyzeAgentMessages
nodes.summary: Analyzes an array of SDK messages, extracting the assistant text and any errors. Handles result messages with error subtypes and error hint mapping.

nodes.name: extractAssistantText
nodes.summary: Convenience wrapper returning only the text portion from analyzeAgentMessages.

nodes.name: utils.ts
nodes.summary: Shared utility module exporting the cn() function for merging Tailwind CSS class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.

nodes.name: cn
nodes.summary: Merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge, resolving Tailwind CSS class conflicts.

nodes.name: main.tsx
nodes.summary: Application entry point. Creates React root and renders the App component inside StrictMode.

nodes.name: ChatPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Main chat page layout component. Renders ChatPanel and conditionally shows ToolPanel based on UI store visibility state.

nodes.name: ChatPage
nodes.summary: Page component rendering a flex layout with ChatPanel (main) and ToolPanel (side, conditional). Reads toolPanelVisible from UIStore.

nodes.name: SettingsPage.tsx
nodes.summary: Settings page with sidebar navigation for General, Model, and MCP settings tabs. Uses local state for active tab management.

nodes.name: SettingsPage
nodes.summary: Page component rendering settings navigation with three tabs (general, model, mcp) and corresponding settings panels inside ScrollArea.

nodes.name: router/index.tsx
nodes.summary: Application router configuration using react-router-dom. Defines routes for Chat (index), Settings, Search (placeholder), Plugins (placeholder), and Automation (placeholder) inside AppLayout.

nodes.name: chatStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store managing chat state: messages array, processing flag, and operations for adding/updating messages and tool calls.

nodes.name: useChatStore
nodes.summary: Zustand store hook providing messages[], isProcessing, addMessage, updateMessage, clearMessages, setProcessing, addToolCall, updateToolCall actions.

nodes.name: sessionStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store managing session state: sessions array, current session ID, and operations for adding/removing/updating sessions.

nodes.name: useSessionStore
nodes.summary: Zustand store hook providing sessions[], currentSessionId, addSession, removeSession, setCurrentSession, updateSession actions.

nodes.name: uiStore.ts
nodes.summary: Zustand store managing UI state: sidebar collapsed, tool panel visibility/tab, selected file, and toggle/set actions.

nodes.name: useUIStore
nodes.summary: Zustand store hook providing sidebarCollapsed, toolPanelVisible, toolPanelTab, selectedFile, toggleSidebar, toggleToolPanel, setToolPanelTab, setSelectedFile actions.

nodes.name: globals.css
nodes.summary: Global stylesheet defining Tailwind CSS theme variables (primary green palette, sidebar/content/tool background colors), base typography, and custom scrollbar styling.

nodes.name: vite.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vite build configuration for the renderer app. Enables React and Tailwind CSS plugins, sets up @ path alias, and configures dev server on port 3000.

nodes.name: vitest.config.ts
nodes.summary: Vitest test configuration enabling globals and jsdom environment for unit testing the renderer app.

nodes.name: spec-streaming.md
nodes.summary: Technical specification for implementing real streaming output from agent runtime. Documents the root cause (non-streaming LLM providers), proposes streaming architecture (StreamBus, StreamAdapter, streaming providers), defines the AgentStreamEvent protocol, and outlines phased implementation plan (P0 text streaming, P1 tool call streaming, P2 tool execution streaming).

nodes.name: v0.md
nodes.summary: Desktop Agent V0 product requirements document. Defines product positioning (local desktop AI workstation), target users (developers, office workers, power users), V0 feature scope (Chat, Coding Agent, File Agent, Office Agents, MCP), system architecture, tool specifications, and success criteria.

nodes.name: eslint.config.js
nodes.summary: ESLint flat config using typescript-eslint. Ignores dist and node_modules directories, applies recommended rules with warnings for unused vars (with _ prefix exception) and explicit any.

nodes.name: agent-runtime/package.json
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @desktop-agent/agent-runtime (v0.1.0). ESM module with build/test scripts. Depends on open-agent-sdk, @desktop-agent/shared, and @desktop-agent/tools. Dev deps: typescript, vitest.

nodes.name: index.ts
nodes.summary: Package entry point for agent-runtime. Re-exports AgentRuntime and RuntimeOptions from runtime module, SDK types (Agent, AgentOptions, SDKMessage), and all shared types from @desktop-agent/shared.

nodes.name: AgentRuntime
nodes.summary: Core agent runtime that manages agent sessions, sends messages, executes tools, and tracks conversation history via the open-agent-sdk

nodes.name: StreamingOpenAIProvider
nodes.summary: LLM provider that implements the OpenAI completions API with streaming SSE, message/tool format conversion, and text delta callbacks

nodes.name: AgentRuntimeTypes
nodes.summary: TypeScript type definitions for agent configuration, responses, artifacts, stream events, and callbacks

nodes.name: AgentRuntimeTests
nodes.summary: Vitest tests for AgentRuntime verifying agent creation and session lookup with mocked open-agent-sdk

nodes.name: AgentRuntimeTSConfig
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for agent-runtime package; extends base config, references shared and tools packages

nodes.name: AgentRuntimeVitestConfig
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for agent-runtime with globals enabled and node environment

nodes.name: SharedPackageJson
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @desktop-agent/shared defining the shared types library with build/test scripts

nodes.name: SharedTypes
nodes.summary: Shared type definitions for Tool, ToolResult, Session, Message, Artifact, and ToolCall used across all packages

nodes.name: SharedTypesTests
nodes.summary: Vitest tests verifying shared type object creation for Session and Message

nodes.name: SharedTSConfig
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for shared package; extends base config with composite build

nodes.name: SharedVitestConfig
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for shared package with globals enabled and node environment

nodes.name: ToolsPackageJson
nodes.summary: Package manifest for @desktop-agent/tools; depends on @desktop-agent/shared workspace package

nodes.name: ToolsIndex
nodes.summary: Barrel export file for tools package; re-exports toolRegistry and all individual tool modules

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Singleton ToolRegistry class that stores, retrieves, lists, and executes registered tools by name

nodes.name: CodeTool
nodes.summary: Code operation tool (read/search/modify/generate) registered in toolRegistry; placeholder implementation

nodes.name: FileTool
nodes.summary: File operation tool (read/write/list/move/delete/copy) registered in toolRegistry; placeholder implementation

nodes.name: ShellTool
nodes.summary: Shell command execution tool registered in toolRegistry; placeholder implementation

nodes.name: McpTool
nodes.summary: MCP (Model Context Protocol) tool for server method calls registered in toolRegistry; placeholder implementation

nodes.name: OfficeTool
nodes.summary: Office document processing tool (docx/pptx/xlsx create/read/modify) registered in toolRegistry; placeholder implementation

nodes.name: ToolRegistryTests
nodes.summary: Vitest tests for ToolRegistry verifying tool registration and listing

nodes.name: ToolsTSConfig
nodes.summary: TypeScript config for tools package; extends base config, references shared package

nodes.name: ToolsVitestConfig
nodes.summary: Vitest configuration for tools package with globals enabled and node environment

nodes.name: RootVitestConfig
nodes.summary: Root vitest configuration for the monorepo with globals enabled and node environment

nodes.name: VitestWorkspaceConfig
nodes.summary: Vitest workspace configuration that aggregates vitest configs from apps/* and packages/* directories

nodes.name: AgentRuntime
nodes.summary: Manages agent instances per session: creates agents, sends messages, executes tools, retrieves message history, and handles cleanup

nodes.name: RuntimeOptions
nodes.summary: Configuration options for AgentRuntime including API key, model, provider type, base URL, working directory, max turns, and permission mode

nodes.name: StreamingOpenAIProvider
nodes.summary: Implements LLMProvider interface for OpenAI completions API with streaming SSE parsing, message format conversion, and tool call handling

nodes.name: ToolRegistry
nodes.summary: Singleton registry that stores tools by name, supports registration, lookup, listing, and execution with error handling

nodes.name: createAgent
nodes.summary: Method on AgentRuntime that creates and registers a new agent instance for a given session ID

nodes.name: sendMessage
nodes.summary: Sends a message to an agent session, auto-creating the agent if needed, returns async generator of SDK messages

nodes.name: prompt
nodes.summary: Sends a prompt to an agent session and returns the text result

nodes.name: executeTool
nodes.summary: Executes a named tool with given input via an agent session, returning a ToolResult

nodes.name: getMessages
nodes.summary: Retrieves and normalizes message history from an agent session into Message objects

nodes.name: createMessage
nodes.summary: Implements LLMProvider.createMessage: converts messages/tools, calls OpenAI API with streaming, parses SSE chunks into normalized response

nodes.name: parseSSE
nodes.summary: Async generator that reads a ReadableStream of SSE data, parses JSON chunks from 'data:' lines

nodes.name: convertMessages
nodes.summary: Converts normalized message params into OpenAI chat message format with system prompt support

nodes.name: convertTools
nodes.summary: Converts normalized tool definitions into OpenAI function calling format

nodes.name: register
nodes.summary: Registers a Tool instance in the ToolRegistry map by its name

nodes.name: execute
nodes.summary: Looks up a tool by name in the registry and executes it with the given input, returning ToolResult

edges.description: HTML entrypoint is served by the renderer package's Vite dev server
package.json defines the build scripts that use the tsconfig
package.json defines scripts that operate on the pnpm workspace packages (apps/*, packages/*)
Root build scripts invoke TypeScript compilation which uses the base tsconfig
Workspace definition scopes pnpm operations to packages defined in the root package.json
tsconfig is consumed by workspace packages whose build lifecycle is managed by root package.json scripts

edges.label: imports Session, Message, ToolCall, ToolResult from shared
calls parseSSE to iterate stream chunks
calls convertTools for tool format conversion
calls createAgent if agent not found

layers.name: Electron 主进程
layers.description: Electron 主进程代码，负责窗口管理、IPC 通信、Agent 运行时初始化

layers.name: 渲染器 UI 组件
layers.description: React 前端 UI 组件，包括聊天界面、设置面板、工具展示和通用 UI 原子组件

layers.name: 状态管理与 hooks
layers.description: Zustand 状态管理 stores 和自定义 hooks，负责应用状态和 IPC 通信桥接

layers.name: Agent 运行时
layers.description: 核心 agent 运行时包，管理 agent 生命周期、消息流和 OpenAI streaming provider

layers.name: 工具集
layers.description: 工具注册表和 5 个工具实现（代码、文件、Shell、MCP、Office），提供 agent 能力扩展

layers.name: 共享类型
layers.description: 跨包共享的类型定义和工具函数

layers.name: 项目配置
layers.description: 根级 monorepo 配置、TypeScript 基础配置、构建工具配置

layers.name: 文档
layers.description: 项目文档，包括架构设计和产品规划

tour.title: 项目概览
tour.description: 这是一个基于 Electron 的 AI 桌面工作助手（Desktop Agent），采用 pnpm monorepo 架构。项目包含 Electron 主进程、React 渲染器前端、agent 运行时和工具集。

tour.title: Electron 主进程
tour.description: main.ts 是应用入口，创建 BrowserWindow、初始化 AgentRuntime、注册 5 个 IPC 处理器。preload.ts 通过 contextBridge 暴露安全的 electronAPI.agent 接口给渲染器。

tour.title: 渲染器应用架构
tour.description: React 19 + Vite + Tailwind CSS 4 构建的前端。使用 Zustand 进行状态管理（chatStore、sessionStore、uiStore），通过 useAgent hook 桥接 Electron IPC 实现流式通信。

tour.title: 聊天界面
tour.description: 核心用户交互界面。ChatPanel 包含 MessageList（消息展示）、ChatInput（输入框）、ToolCallCard（工具调用展示）。消息支持流式渲染和错误提示映射。

tour.title: 状态管理与通信
tour.description: useAgent hook 是渲染器与 Electron 主进程的桥梁，通过 window.electronAgent 调用 IPC 方法实现流式消息接收。agentMessage.ts 解析 SDK 消息格式并处理错误映射。

tour.title: 设置面板
tour.description: 三个设置页面：GeneralSettings（通用设置）、ModelSettings（模型配置）、McpSettings（MCP 服务器配置）。支持添加/删除/测试 MCP 服务器连接。

tour.title: Agent 运行时
tour.description: packages/agent-runtime 是核心包。AgentRuntime 管理 agent 生命周期，StreamingOpenAIProvider 处理 OpenAI SSE 流式响应和工具调用累积。依赖 @codeany/open-agent-sdk 外部 SDK。

tour.title: 工具系统
tour.description: toolRegistry 单例管理 5 个工具实现：codeTool（代码执行）、fileTool（文件操作）、shellTool（Shell 命令）、mcpTool（MCP 协议）、officeTool（Office 文档）。工具在模块加载时自动注册。

tour.title: 共享类型
tour.description: packages/shared 提供跨包共享的类型定义，被 tools 和 agent-runtime 包依赖。

tour.title: 架构设计文档
tour.description: spec-streaming.md 详细规划了流式架构（StreamBus、StreamAdapter、AgentStreamEvent 协议）。v0.md 定义了产品范围：Coding Agent、File Agent、Office Agents、MCP 支持。
